theme: reverse-engineer a lottery machine from old draws
title: Lottery Machine Forensics
strategies: gcd-of-determinant-combinations modulus recovery + a single GLOBAL modular inverse to solve the multiplier/increment (trap: silently trusts the gcd magnitude as m, and any planted frozen prime component poisons the whole global modulus and blocks every consecutive-difference inverse)

gcd-of-determinant-combinations modulus recovery corrected by DISTINCT-prime-factor extraction (strips the bonus p^2 a frozen component adds), then PER-PRIME regime diagnosis (frozen-constant vs affine) with CRT-recombined fast-forward
